title: Black Clover Manga Reaches Climax
content: Shueisha 's "Jump Press" livestream revealed on Monday that Yūki Tabata 's Black Clover manga is reaching its climax. There will be three chapters in Jump Giga 's spring issue on May 1.
author: ANN

title: Kagurabachi Creator Breaks Silence on New Anime With Big Naruto Shout Out
content: Kagurabachi has officially announced it’s finally getting its own anime next year , and the creator behind it all gave Naruto a surprise shout out to help celebrate. Kagurabachi first made its debut with Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine back in 2023, and fans have been asking for it to get its own anime even…
author: ComicBook

title: Rich Girl Caretaker Reveals New Visual, Additional Cast
content: The previously announced Rich Girl Caretaker anime revealed a new key visual along with two additional cast members on Monday. Joining the cast are Saori Onishi as Mirei Tennoji and Rio Tsuchiya as Narika Miyakojima. Brain’s Base is animating the series.
author: Anime Corner

title: Rock Band Unison Square Garden Suspend Activities Following Drummer Takao Suzuki's Departure
content: The members formed the band Unison in July 2004 before changing their name to Unison Square Garden . They released their first single "Sentimental Period" in July 2008. The current members are vocalist and guitarist Kōsuke Saitō and bass guitarist Tomoya Tabuchi .
author: ANN

title: The Irregular at Magic High School 'Escape Arc,' 'Upheaval Prologue Arc' Manga Both End
content: The June issue of Kadokawa 's Monthly Comic Dengeki Daioh magazine published the final chapters of both Yuzuki N Dash 's Mahōka Kōkō no Rettōsei: Escape-hen manga and Mei Higuchi 's Mahōka Kōkō no Rettōsei: Dōran no Joshō-hen manga on Monday.
author: ANN

title: 5 Classic ’90s Cartoons That Actually Need a Modern Live-Action Remake
content: Live-action adaptations of beloved animated franchises are becoming more prevalent these days, with the likes of One Piece , Avatar: The Last Airbender , and many more populating the airwaves.
author: ComicBook

title: Major Shonen Jump Series to Return With Surprise Revival This Summer (First Look Revealed)
content: One major Shonen Jump franchise is coming back for a surprising revival later this Summer to help celebrate its 10th anniversary. It’s been a wild few years for Shonen Jump as fans of its most classic franchises have likely noticed that many are making their returns with new spinoffs, reboots, sequels or more kinds of…
author: ComicBook

title: Kageki Shojo!! Manga Takes 1-Issue Break, Returns in June
content: Saiki revealed on her X (formerly Twitter ) account on April 6 that she was injured at a music festival she had attended in Ariake district in Tokyo on March 29, after someone in the audience did a sudden dive into the crowd, colliding with her head and arm.
author: ANN

title: Jujutsu Kaisen Promises Return From Major Missing Character With New Release After Finale
content: Jujutsu Kaisen’ s big sequel is coming back with something special after the manga’s finale, and the team behind it all is promising the return of a major missing character. Series creator Gege Akutami shocked fans last year when he suddenly returned to the pages of Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine with an…
author: ComicBook

title: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You Anime Reveals 4 More Cast Members, June 3 Limited Advance Streaming on Abema Japan
content: The staff for the television anime of Jinushi 's Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You ( Super no Ura de Yani Sū Futari ) manga revealed a new key visual and four additional cast members on Monday.
author: ANN
